description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and three above-ground stories. The front facade features large, evenly spaced windows and a paved driveway with two parked cars, suggesting a multi-family or townhouse design. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious, walled backyard with a well-maintained lawn and a row of trees or shrubs along the back fence, providing privacy and greenery. The side views reveal a mix of white and dark exterior finishes, with the lower portion clad in stone or brick and the upper stories in smooth, painted surfaces. The roof appears to be partially open or used as a terrace, with visible outdoor furniture and planters. The overall design is clean, geometric, and functional, with a focus on maximizing natural light and outdoor space.
description: A modern, three-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious backyard enclosed by a stone wall. The exterior features a mix of dark and white finishes, with a paved driveway and rooftop terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two parked cars on a paved driveway, and large, symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long backyard, stone wall, and a mix of white and stone exterior finishes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive green lawn, back wall with dense shrubs, and multiple windows overlooking the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, the backyard, and the dark exterior finish.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with a paved driveway, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
